items.name_en: CALYPSO Elephant Grain Calfskin Chain Bag
items.name_cn:
CALYPSO Elephant Grain Calfskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian calf leather, soft and smooth to the touch. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic four-clasp closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables. The minimalist interior design allows for effortless use.
Size: 35.5×21×9cm
Model: 777399

items.name_en: CALYPSO Patent Chain Bag
items.name_cn:
CALYPSO Patent Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian patent leather, featuring classic Y-logo, chain, and buckle hardware in matte gold. The flap closes with a magnetic snap for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables; aside from this, there are no other interior pockets, allowing for a free and easy use experience!
Size: 26×14×7cm
Model: 734153

items.name_en: CAMERA BOX Series M82465 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
CAMERA BOX Series M82465 Uninspected Version#
■ Size: 12.5*17.6*6cm ■
A must-have showpiece for autumn and winter. This camera box series is simply an instant hit!
The reversible color-block soft box design paired with a small handle makes the bag look exquisite, petite, yet elegant and sophisticated!
The four-corner hardware is heavy-duty quality, the authentic small hard suitcase standard!
Truly another "King of Hits"—not only does it have stunning looks, but it also satisfies daily capacity needs. More importantly, it offers versatile carrying styles!

items.name_en: Caramel 'Export Product' OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 25k Large Diamond Calfskin LP Box 👅👅 Black Gold! Play with the LP Box bag new large diamond pattern 🌟🌟 Version is very classic and atmospheric, the front double C is eye-catching and exquisite, calfskin material is not delicate at all!! Textured when carried by hand, and adds a casual elegance when worn on the chain. Easily adapts to different styles, can hold daily small items, turns heads when worn~ A definite fashion item ✓ Size: 17x19.5x5cm

items.name_en: Caramel Brown🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25B Heavyweight, don't blink😉, small bucket bag, instantly falling in love with the ethereal cream white. Classic diamond quilted stitching + mini double C logo, low-key and luxurious.· Pull the drawstring to instantly become a "🤩🤩 lucky bag", full anti-theft skills.· The chain ⛓️ length can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or slung casually, friendly for petite frames. Instantly photogenic with a Southern France vacation vibe! This one is on the "heirloom" list, sisters waiting for 25B, go for it! The elegance of the diamond quilt, the embellishment of the gold chain, this black handbag is simply too high-end. Large and small pocket design, practical and stylish, paired with gold metal ring details, texture maxed out~ Light luxury style! 4775Size: 12.5×10×7cm

items.name_en: Caramel Calfskin
items.name_cn:
Caramel Calfskin
Extraordinary lightweight texture, named for the exquisite Y logo inspired by the fashion house's archival designs.
Elegant and structured, the handle features a hollow-out design and comes with an adjustable detachable shoulder strap for various carrying options.
Gives a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Unisex, suitable as a briefcase or travel tote, with extra-large capacity.
Model: 800224
Dimensions: 23×29.5×3-8.5cm
Handle Height: 7cm
Shoulder Strap Length: 48cm
